governing_law.value: Laws of the State of California
governing_law.exact_text: ALL DISPUTES ARISING OUT OF THIS AGREEMENT SHALL BE SETTLED VIA BINDING ARBITRATION ACCORDING TO THE RULES AND REGULATIONS SET FORTH BY THE AMERICAN ARBITRATION ASSOCIATION IN SAN DIEGO COUNTY , THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA.

fields.payment_terms: Within 30 days of the end of each quarter
fields.notice_period: Not less than sixty (60) days prior to the end of a Term
